parents.subject: LU-17638 util: remove newer lnetctl export handling

commit.subject: LU-17638 lnet: debug peer export breakage
commit.message:
LU-17638 lnet: debug peer export breakage

Revert bit by bit to find out why maloo testbed breaks things.
Try new peer handling.

Change-Id: Ifb8b9b1680e15be00b640b5549cbf7964c8ceca7
Signed-off-by: James Simmons <jsimmons@infradead.org>
